description: Specify ball group names. Groups are used to organize balls and apply commands to specific subsets. By default, the group name is assigned to the slot 'Default'.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Range of balls to assign to group (default: all balls)

keywords.name: slot
keywords.description: Assign group s to slot s2 (default slot: 'Default')

keywords.name: add
keywords.description: Assign group s to next available slot (preserves existing groups)

keywords.name: remove
keywords.description: Remove group s from all slots

examples.description: Assign balls in y-position range to group 'top_grip' (default slot)

examples.command: ball group 'inclusions' range circle center -1.0 -3.0 radius 0.5
examples.description: Assign balls within circular region to group 'inclusions'
Assign balls in z-range to group 'layer1' in slot 'layer'
Add group 'active' to next available slot for balls 1-100
Remove group 'old_group' from all balls in all slots

python_sdk_alternative.workaround: Ball.set_group(group_name, slot=None) - requires iteration: for b in itasca.ball.list(): b.set_group('name')
